name: Drake Approve/Reject
layout_guidance: Two-panel meme. Top panel: character rejecting/disliking something (hand up, looking away). Bottom panel: character approving/pointing at the preferred thing (smiling, nodding). Each panel has text on the right side.

name: Distracted Boyfriend
layout_guidance: Three characters walking on a street. Boyfriend looking back at another person (the temptation) while his girlfriend (the current thing) looks disapproved. Each character is labeled with text.

name: Expanding Brain
layout_guidance: Four panels stacked vertically. Each panel shows a brain getting progressively larger/more glowing. Left side has increasingly 'enlightened' (actually absurd) text options. The last panel is the most ridiculous take presented as genius.

name: Wojak / Feels Guy
layout_guidance: Simple line-drawn character (Wojak) with exaggerated sad/coping expression. Bold text caption above or below. Can show mask (happy outside, crying inside) variant. Minimalist style, raw emotion.

name: This Is Fine
layout_guidance: Cartoon dog sitting at a table drinking coffee in a room engulfed in flames. Speech bubble says 'This is fine.' Can modify the fire or what's burning to match the topic.

name: Trade Offer
layout_guidance: Person in business attire presenting a 'trade offer' with two sections: 'I receive:' on one side and 'You receive:' on the other. The deal is comically unfair. Bold text labels for each side.

name: Always Has Been
layout_guidance: Two astronauts in space looking at Earth. First astronaut has a revelation ('Wait, it's all X?'). Second astronaut behind him with a gun says 'Always has been.' Earth can show relevant imagery.

name: NPC vs Chad
layout_guidance: Split panel. Left: gray NPC (non-player character) face with generic/conformist opinion. Right: muscular Chad character with bold/contrarian take. Text above each character.

name: Two Buttons / Sweating Guy
layout_guidance: Sweating person staring at two large buttons, each labeled with a conflicting choice. The person is visibly distressed about which to press. Exaggerated sweat drops.

name: Bell Curve / Midwit
layout_guidance: Bell curve/normal distribution chart. Left tail (low IQ): simple, correct take. Middle peak (midwit): overthinking, wrong take. Right tail (genius): same simple take as left. Characters at each position.

name: Mocking SpongeBob
layout_guidance: SpongeBob character in a contorted, chicken-like pose. Text above in aLtErNaTiNg CaSe mocking a statement. Simple image, all emphasis on the mocking text.

name: Surprised Pikachu
layout_guidance: Setup text describing an obviously bad decision, followed by the predictable bad outcome, with Pikachu's shocked face (mouth open, wide eyes). The joke is that the outcome was completely predictable.

name: Astronaut Looking at Earth
layout_guidance: Single astronaut floating in space, looking down at Earth. Reflective visor shows something relevant. Caption text overlay. Contemplative mood, sense of scale.

name: GigaChad
layout_guidance: Hyper-masculine GigaChad character (chiseled jaw, perfect physique) doing something with supreme confidence. Caption describes the based/chad behavior. Black and white or high contrast photo style.

name: Clown Putting On Makeup
layout_guidance: Four panels showing a person progressively applying clown makeup. Each panel has text describing an increasingly foolish decision. Final panel is full clown face with the worst decision. Sequence of self-owns.
